summary: The one-use Foreman Netlify continuous-deployment approval linked the existing site to its canonical GitHub repository and was consumed.

relatedArtifacts.reference: Netlify link attempt and failed deploy 6a5843bcdd7fdd3599d11e1c

notes: Netlify returned provider github, repository gurnoorbassi/Foreman-Quote-Maker, and branch main. No domain, DNS, environment variable, credential, paid, customer-data, n8n, messaging, or posting change was requested.
